message:
fix(harness): suppress clippy::needless_return in conditional diff render

Add #[allow(clippy::needless_return)] to the frankentui-ui cfg branch
in render_diff. The explicit return is required because the function has
a cfg-gated fallback branch below — removing the return keyword would
cause a compile error when the feature is enabled but the fallback arm
is also present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
